_description: 追踪当前全量审计周期状态。全量审计事件驱动：上次派生的 fix 全部 merge/reject 落定后才触发下一次全量审计。引擎每轮 step 0 读这个文件决定本轮是审计轮还是瞭望轮。
current_audit_module: apps/daemon/src (server entry, auth, origin validation, MCP OAuth/config/tokens, agents, byok-tools, desktop-auth, sandbox-mode, routes/deploy, routes/host-tools, routes/static-resource, plugins/trust, plugins/installer, library-install, terminals, deploy)

derived_fixes.description: Terminal route accepts arbitrary shell binary from request body → RCE
Git clone from user-supplied GitHub URL enables RCE via git hooks
OAuth client cache written without chmod 0600; clientSecret world-readable
API bearer token compared with non-constant-time string equality
Deploy route pushes to Vercel/Cloudflare without confirmation gate or rate limit
Plugin archive fetcher follows redirects without SSRF safeguards
Portless loopback origin bypass allows cross-origin GET from any localhost page
OAuth callback postMessage with wildcard targetOrigin
Token refresh race condition — no deduplication of concurrent refresh attempts
BYOK API key fallback silently escalates to global credentials
Pending OAuth state cache unbounded → memory exhaustion
MCP config file (mcp-config.json) written without chmod
BYOK image generation logs full base URL including potential query-string credentials
Skill import route lacks explicit body size limit
Host-tools open-in passes unsanitized metadata.baseDir to spawn
OD_DISABLE_API_AUTH=1 silently removes public-bind safety guard (direction-shift)

history.module: apps/daemon/src (server entry, auth, origin, MCP, routes, plugins)
history._note: First-ever deep audit on open-design. apps/daemon high attack surface density: no mandatory auth on /api/*, arbitrary subprocess spawn, plaintext OAuth secret storage, local-plugin auto-trust. 16 derived fixes pending dispatch. 11 structural debts queued (auth layer, plugin trust model, private-IP origin policy, env-override containment, sandbox TOCTOU, dangerous-env denylist, token-via-env transport, desktop-auth state machine, nonce-map bound, plaintext cred storage, OD_DISABLE_API_AUTH policy).
